info.summary: Search BookStack knowledge base articles from Nextcloud
info.description:
Integrates BookStack into Nextcloud's global search. Search your BookStack knowledge base directly from Nextcloud — results open in a new tab.
Features: - BookStack articles appear in Nextcloud's global search - Search results link directly to BookStack (opens in new tab) - Per-user API token configuration in personal settings - Admin sets the BookStack URL once for all users
info.author: You
